title: acalypha klotzschii
intro: Acalypha klotzschii, also known as the bushy copperleaf or copper bush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It is a shrub or small tree native to tropical Africa. Acalypha klotzschii has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, and to promote wound healing.
